title: Unity Mac engine, save, renderer, and pipeline spike
objective: Prove or falsify the exact D-0047 Unity 6000.3.19f1 ARM64 toolchain as the Mac-first technical foundation under the proposed official Unity Authorized Agentic Access boundary, which has no authority until a creator-ratified successor to D-0048 and a sealed WP-0001 acceptance receipt bind the exact route, by producing a reproducible native IL2CPP ARM64 build with a dual-use non-Unity fixed-tick state core, synthetic exact-ownership recovery, the byte-exact Save Envelope/root/pointer/protected-retention-anchor v1 contracts, batch automation, a representative dynamic-building render test, and one Blender calibration package.
value: This is the smallest reversible implementation that can expose engine, saving, automation, renderer, and asset-pipeline risks without authorizing gameplay assumptions.
in_scope: Provision the D-0047 candidate toolchain and empty temporary project only after sealed acceptance, inside the bounded creator-operated setup phase: Unity Hub 3.19.5; Unity 6000.3.19f1 changeset 7689f4515d75 ARM64 with Mac Build Support (IL2CPP); Xcode 26.3; Unity-required Rosetta 2; URP 17.3; Unity Test Framework 1.6; Mono iteration; IL2CPP ARM64 acceptance. No packet implementation begins until protected A1 entry.

Add .NET SDK 10.0.301 only as the pinned headless build/test SDK selected through root global.json with rollForward disabled; restore PackageReferences through committed lockfiles and --locked-mode. Unity-consumed shared projects target netstandard2.1, use C# 9 or lower, and stay inside Unity's supported API/language surface; headless test/runner projects may target net10.0.

Only after a creator-ratified successor to D-0048 and a sealed packet-acceptance receipt authorize the exact route, use Unity Registry-resolved com.unity.ai.assistant 2.14.0-pre.1 with an eligible Unity subscription, an assigned creator seat, and a project linked to the same Unity organization. The acceptance receipt selects exactly one mutually exclusive route claim: UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX or UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL. Stop Unity work on any authorization or version drift.

For UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX, use Assistant's AI Gateway with Unity's bundled Codex CLI; Unity controls the bundled version. Bind package/version, subscription/seat, organization/project linkage, Gateway availability, bundled client/version evidence, applicable provider/model and credential-presence metadata without secret values, scopes/rate limits, revocation state, and initiation identity. Gateway connections are auto-approved; do not claim or require an MCP client, relay/server, or first-connection approval for this route.

For UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL, require the Unity MCP Bridge to show Running, the exact Unity-installed Apple-Silicon relay under ~/.unity/relay/ with its resolved absolute path and digest/version, --mcp plus explicit project targeting, an exact external MCP client/version, and creator review/approval of the first pending connection. Bind package/version, subscription/seat, organization/project linkage, bridge, relay/server, client, target, connection, scopes/rate limits, revocation state, and initiation identity. Do not claim or require AI Gateway for this route.

After sealed packet acceptance but before A1 activation, permit only a creator-operated setup phase: install/open the exact Editor and modules, create the temporary project identity, link the approved organization/project, resolve the Assistant package from Unity Registry, and configure the selected route. For UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX, the creator configures bundled Codex and records the auto-approved route. For UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL, the creator starts the exact client with no model/agent prompt, permits only the protocol handshake needed to create the pending connection, reviews and allows it in Unity, records zero Unity tool invocations, and disconnects. No model/agent prompt or Unity tool invocation is permitted during setup; its evidence is input to the separate physical-quarantine activation receipt.

Record exact Editor-generated package resolution and lockfiles with enableLockFile=true and resolutionStrategy=lowest, Xcode/toolchain, accepted terms, D-0048 successor access evidence, known issues, retained installers, and rollback tuple; fail if a clean clone silently rewrites the manifest or lock. The pinned Editor, packages, build profile, external SDK, and native smoke evidence form one reviewed unit.

Create SimulationCore and SaveContracts as dual-use ordinary .NET projects and local Unity packages that compile the same source files without copying; the core uses stable IDs, fixed ticks, integer/fixed-point policy, and injected clock, counter/key RNG, storage, and logging, with no UnityEngine dependency. SaveContracts may depend on SimulationCore; the reverse dependency is forbidden.
Implement a synthetic two-domain ownership transaction with idempotent retry and crash-phase recovery, without choosing city or road gameplay.

Implement byte-exact Save Envelope v1, root header v1, initial versioned synthetic sections, slot pointer v1, immutable generations, protected retention-anchor receipt v1, crash-safe pruning/anchor advance, fault injection, bounded recovery scan, load, and canonical state comparison.
Pin the random algorithm/version, canonical-state encoding/version, and numeric policy through a cross-runtime golden vector.
Pin a full Draft 2020-12 validator, meta-validate schemas, and commit positive plus adversarial save/pointer/retention-anchor/packet/asset fixtures.

Create batch test/build/report commands and a native IL2CPP ARM64 application; Unity test runs omit -quit, require parsed NUnit XML plus Editor logs, and enforce a timeout. Verify ENABLE_IL2CPP, the application executable, and GameAssembly are arm64, launch the built player directly, require machine-readable success evidence, and run the representative Metal soak on the protected target Mac.

Create candidate `.github/workflows/wp0001-ci.yml` with read-only permissions and no deploy, merge, release, receipt, or Unity credentials; it runs foundation, pure-.NET, and Unity-static-contract checks only. GitHub Actions never starts a Unity process in WP-0001, and a manual workflow trigger is not authorization. Native Unity evidence is produced by the creator-operated local wrapper, the exact receipt-authorized official Gateway/MCP route, or separately receipt-authorized Unity Build Automation, then imported through the creator boundary.
Create the benchmark harness and capture the provisional slice protocol.
Test a representative dynamic placed-building scene with per-instance faction/condition data, LODs, shadows, probes, and batching compatibility.
Export and import one Blender calibration package with scale, pivot, material, LOD, collider, socket, manifest, and provenance validation.
Document Godot fallback triggers.

If D-0048 selects fallback, supersede this packet with the same representative benchmark on Godot .NET 4.7.1 commit a13da4feb, Universal macOS ARM64/x86_64, matching .NET export templates, .NET SDK 8+, Forward+ native Metal, official headless CI, and MIT license; do not install or preselect it here.

The same ACCEPT-WP-0001 receipt must bind `AUTHORIZE-TEMP-WP0001-IDENTITY`: Company `LocalFoundationLab`; Product `SashaAtomicLandPirate_WP0001`; Bundle ID `local.foundation.sashaatomiclandpirate.wp0001`; isolated save profiles `wp0001-dev-v1` and `wp0001-test-v1`; temporary/non-shipping with no prior-root discovery or migration.

Emit candidate scenario/control-plane revisions and their hashes only under `BuildArtifacts/WP-0001/candidate-control-plane/`; A1 treats the protected foundation and registries as read-only inputs and cannot rewrite them.
non_goals: Final art direction or production assets.
Production-scale city or population capacity claims.
Final driving physics, combat, AI, or seamless world streaming.
Production economy balance or campaign content.
Automatic merge, autonomy promotion, or feature rollout.
Any city-grammar, vehicle-control, travel-topology, faction, module, or other creator-owned gameplay decision.
Ratifying durable D-0038 company, product, bundle, or save-root identity; the exact WP-0001 tuple is temporary, non-shipping, and forbidden for distributed saves.

Any direct agent or GitHub Actions invocation of Unity Hub, Unity Editor, Unity CLI, the Unity executable, or batchmode, including after activation; agent-originated Unity interaction is permitted only through the exact receipt-authorized official Unity Gateway/MCP route, while human setup/initiation remains creator-controlled and Unity Build Automation requires its own exact runner receipt.
Any unapproved third-party Unity MCP server, unassigned/shared Unity AI seat, secret committed to Git, or runtime dependency on Unity Cloud services.
Treating a creator's repository/CI greenlight as a waiver of Unity's terms or as permission for unattended Unity automation.
interfaces: Command -> authoritative state transition -> domain event -> read model
Shared netstandard2.1 source -> ordinary .NET project and local Unity package without duplication
Persisted stable-ID allocators and counter/key randomness
Cross-mode ownership transaction and idempotency ledger
Save Envelope v1 immutable generation, pointer, and protected retention anchor
Blender asset manifest -> quarantine validator -> engine prefab

save_impact.summary: S1 additive: establish and then freeze physical envelope v1, root header v1, pointer v1, protected retention-anchor receipt v1, initial versioned synthetic sections, golden fixtures, and recovery tooling before user saves exist.
schema_changes: Create envelope v1, root header v1, slot-pointer v1, protected retention-anchor receipt v1, a save-contract manifest, and independently versioned synthetic state/ownership sections.
save_impact.compatibility: No pre-existing player save. Acceptance freezes envelope/root/pointer/retention-anchor v1. Later packets may add a named section only with a manifest absence default, or must bump/migrate a touched section; they may not redefine these fixtures.

acceptance_tests.oracle: A sealed acceptance receipt first binds the exact packet, temporary identity, installation approval, creator-ratified successor to D-0048, and exactly one route claim, authorizing only the bounded creator-operated setup phase. Before any agent implementation or Unity tool invocation, a separate creator-controlled activation receipt binds the approved protected-main base to a standalone disposable clone or sandbox with an independent .git directory, exact declared path/domain reservation, non-writable trusted constitution/ledger/governance/receipts, restricted credentials, one creator-operated diff/import-or-reject boundary, exact D-0047 tuple, and common package/version, subscription/seat, linked organization/project, scopes/rate limits, initiation-identity, and revocation-state evidence. UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX additionally binds Gateway availability, Unity-bundled Codex/version evidence, applicable provider/model metadata, credential presence without secret values, and automatic-approval status, with no MCP claims. UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL instead binds Unity MCP Bridge running state, exact Unity-installed relay path/digest/version and --mcp/project target, external MCP client/version, creator-approved first connection, and a pre-activation handshake log proving zero Unity tool invocations, with no Gateway claim. A shared Git worktree is forbidden; authorization/version drift stops work; a Godot choice supersedes this packet and runs the same benchmark.

acceptance_tests.command: python3 Tools/Validation/validate_wp0001_identity.py --packet docs/foundation-v0.1/work-packets/proposed/WP-0001.json --project Game --company LocalFoundationLab --product SashaAtomicLandPirate_WP0001 --bundle-id local.foundation.sashaatomiclandpirate.wp0001 --dev-profile wp0001-dev-v1 --test-profile wp0001-test-v1 --require-claim AUTHORIZE-TEMP-WP0001-IDENTITY --forbid-prior-root-discovery
acceptance_tests.oracle: The same creator receipt that accepts WP-0001 binds AUTHORIZE-TEMP-WP0001-IDENTITY and exactly Company=LocalFoundationLab, Product=SashaAtomicLandPirate_WP0001, Bundle ID=local.foundation.sashaatomiclandpirate.wp0001, and isolated save profiles wp0001-dev-v1 and wp0001-test-v1; the tuple is temporary/non-shipping and performs no prior-root discovery or migration.

A standalone clean clone selects the packet-provisioned .NET SDK 10.0.301 through global.json, restores PackageReferences from committed lockfiles with --locked-mode, resolves the exact Editor-generated package graph, and uses the approved build tuple; compilation does not rewrite package files or require undeclared installs.

After the separate activation receipt, the creator initiates the local wrapper manually, or an authorized client requests Unity work only through the selected receipt-authorized route; GitHub Actions never executes this command, and no agent invokes the Unity executable, CLI, or batchmode directly. Common evidence records the route claim, seat, package/version, linked organization/project, scopes/rate limits, revocation state, initiation identity, exact Editor/build profile, parsed test results/logs, native IL2CPP ARM64 build, ENABLE_IL2CPP, lipo checks for the executable and GameAssembly, direct-player launch smoke, report, and bounded timeout. UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX records only its Gateway, bundled Codex/version, applicable provider/model, credential-presence, and auto-approval fields; UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL records only its Bridge, relay/server path/digest/version/arguments/target, external client/version, and approved-connection fields. Evidence from the unselected route is forbidden.
Identical starting state, commands, allocator counters, and RNG keys produce the expected canonical authoritative state.

acceptance_tests.command: python3 Tools/ScenarioRunner/run.py SCN_SPIKE_SLICE --check determinism-vector --runtime pure-csharp --runtime unity-standalone --report BuildArtifacts/WP-0001/determinism-vector.json
acceptance_tests.oracle: The pinned RNG algorithm/version/key/counter and canonical-state numeric policy produce identical committed vectors and hashes in the pure C# runner and Unity standalone player.

Fault injection at every save, pointer, retention-anchor, prefix-deletion, anchor-advance, and rollback-fork boundary preserves a valid protected-root-to-head chain; rollback inspects the source read-only, quarantines rejected descendants outside recovery scan, and continues only in generation 1 of a distinct slot_id/save_id lineage with completed lineage_provenance.

Pointer fields exactly match the selected envelope; every anchor embeds the immutable canonical validated_pointer plus its zero-field digest; missing, corrupt, stale, forked, and slot-mismatched pointers remain distinct; recovery selects only the unique terminal receipt of one non-forked anchor-supersession chain or a valid genesis head, while forks/multiple terminal tips require review and no pointer is silently repaired.

An immutable anchor receipt embeds and validates the exact historical pointer preimage, repeated zero-field pointer digest, envelope/head cross-fields, and supersession link before pruning; coexisting ancestors on one chain remain valid, the unique terminal receipt is active, forks/multiple tips block, and no protected/descendant/unknown file is deleted.

A pinned full Draft 2020-12 validator meta-validates every schema and passes positive/adversarial save/pointer/retention-anchor/packet/asset/scenario fixtures, including typed hashed starting-state/content/input artifacts, revisioned scenario paths, exact packet scenario pins, semantic uniqueness, bounds, totals, compatibility order, generation/anchor chains, and section totals.

Crash/retry at every abstract handoff phase neither duplicates nor loses synthetic payload units, participant handles, tick budgets, condition deltas, or emitted event tokens; no gameplay semantics are selected.

The hash-bound 12-archetype/36-LOD render content manifest and 600-sample technical camera loop reproduce the exact 512-instance geometry, material, texture, LOD, probe, shadow, submission, per-instance state, and budget oracles in SCN_SPIKE_SLICE; this camera is not a D-0022 decision.
Calibration package preserves one-metre scale, pivot/axis, materials, LOD names, collider, socket, manifest, and provenance.
Repeated build/launch and 30-minute GPU soak complete without unhandled Metal timeout/freeze; forced failure has a documented recovery path.
Evidence supports ratifying or superseding D-0013 and D-0033 without production content lock-in.

triggers: Any required acceptance test fails after the allowed bounded iteration.
Save generation or ownership transaction can duplicate, lose, or orphan state.
Known Mac/Metal issue lacks a credible mitigation or recovery path.
The exact engine/toolchain cannot reproduce from a clean clone.
Unity terms or access evidence does not support the selected D-0048 successor operating path.
Any required component of the selected route profile, package version, scope, rate limit, connection, seat, linked project, or revocation state drifts from its protected receipt.
steps: Freeze the candidate and preserve logs, saves, seeds, metrics, and failing artifacts.
Do not promote D-0013/D-0033 or build production content against the candidate.

Revoke the selected route: remove Gateway provider credentials for UNITY-AI-GATEWAY-CODEX, or revoke the approved client and remove its Unity relay configuration for UNITY-MCP-EXTERNAL; then revoke packet credentials, destroy the standalone sandbox/clone, and release reservations without rewriting foundation history.
Run an equivalent bounded Godot spike if a decisive Unity gate failed.
rollback.save_recovery: No user saves exist. Preserve every golden generation and protected retention-anchor receipt, restore the last verified pointer, and never mutate a failing fixture in place.
